message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with security and reliability enhancements

CI Workflow improvements:
- Add explicit permissions block (contents:read, security-events:write)
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs to prevent hung builds
- Upgrade codecov-action from v4 to v5
- Upgrade setup-bun from v1 to v2
- Add permissions for dependency-review job (pull-requests:write)
- Remove emoji characters for better cross-platform log compatibility

Release Workflow improvements:
- Add attestations:write permission for build provenance
- Add artifact attestation step using actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs
- Upgrade docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6
- Enable provenance and sbom for Docker builds
- Fix macos-15 to macos-13 for x64 runner availability
- Add version extraction step for downstream use
- Improve verify job to check archive contents

ACFS Notification:
- Consolidate duplicate workflows (remove acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml)
- Improve notify-acfs.yml with better token checking and logging
- Add support for both push and release events in single workflow
- Add timestamp from release event when applicable

Dependabot:
- Add npm ecosystem for package.json dependencies (Bun/OpenAPI tooling)
- Improve grouping comments for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,12 +27,14 @@ updates:
       prefix: "deps"
       include: "scope"
     groups:
+      # Group all minor/patch updates together to reduce PR noise
       go-minor-and-patch:
         patterns:
           - "*"
         update-types:
           - "minor"
           - "patch"
+      # Group Charmbracelet packages (TUI framework)
       charmbracelet:
         patterns:
           - "github.com/charmbracelet/*"
@@ -61,6 +63,7 @@ updates:
       prefix: "ci"
       include: "scope"
     groups:
+      # Group all action updates together
       actions-minor-and-patch:
         patterns:
           - "*"
@@ -80,3 +83,16 @@ updates:
       - "docker"
     commit-message:
       prefix: "docker"
+
+  # npm/Bun dependencies (for OpenAPI tooling)
+  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 3
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "npm"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "deps"

@@ -1,46 +1,68 @@
-# .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
+# Notifies ACFS (Agentic Coding Flywheel Setup) when installer scripts change,
+# triggering checksum updates for secure installation verification.
 #
-# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change, triggering checksum updates.
-# Use this template for repos with install.sh at the repository root.
+# Triggers:
+#   - Push to main/master affecting install.sh or scripts/install.sh
+#   - New releases published
+#   - Manual workflow dispatch
 #
 # Setup:
 #   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
 #   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
-#   3. Copy this file to .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
 #
 # Related: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-b04c
-#
-name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
+
+name: Notify ACFS
 
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main, master]
     paths:
       - 'install.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger for testing
+      - 'scripts/install.sh'
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+  workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
   notify-acfs:
+    name: Dispatch to ACFS
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
+      - name: Check for dispatch token
+        id: check-token
+        run: |
+          if [ -z "${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}" ]; then
+            echo "has_token=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            echo "::warning::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN. Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup."
+          else
+            echo "has_token=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
       - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
+        if: steps.check-token.outputs.has_token == 'true'
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
           repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
           event-type: upstream-changed
           client-payload: |
             {
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
               "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
               "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
               "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
               "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
-              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || github.event.release.published_at }}"
             }
 
-      - name: Log dispatch
+      - name: Log dispatch result
+        if: steps.check-token.outputs.has_token == 'true'
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
-          echo "   Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
-          echo "   SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
-          echo "   Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
+          echo "  Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "  Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"

+        run: echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
       - name: Set up Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
@@ -54,6 +62,7 @@ jobs:

       - name: Run GoReleaser

         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
@@ -71,12 +80,23 @@ jobs:
           path: dist/
           retention-days: 30
 
+      # Generate attestations for release artifacts
+      - name: Attest build provenance
+        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
+        continue-on-error: true  # Don't fail if attestation fails
+        with:
+          subject-path: |
+            dist/*.tar.gz
+            dist/*.zip
+            dist/checksums.txt
+
   # ============================================================================
   # DOCKER - Build and push multi-arch container images
   # ============================================================================
   docker:
     name: Docker Images
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     needs: release
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
@@ -118,7 +138,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Build and push
         if: steps.dockerfile.outputs.exists == 'true'
-        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
+        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
         with:
           context: .
           platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
@@ -127,13 +147,16 @@ jobs:
           labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
+          provenance: true
+          sbom: true
 
   # ============================================================================
   # VERIFY - Verify release artifacts
   # ============================================================================
   verify:
     name: Verify Release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     needs: release
     steps:
       - name: Download artifacts
@@ -154,16 +177,41 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cd dist
           if [ -f checksums.txt ]; then
-            sha256sum -c checksums.txt --ignore-missing || true
+            echo "Verifying SHA256 checksums..."
+            sha256sum -c checksums.txt --ignore-missing
+            echo "All checksums verified successfully"
+          else
+            echo "No checksums.txt found"
+            exit 1
           fi
 
+      - name: Verify archive contents
+        run: |
+          cd dist
+          echo "Verifying archive contents..."
+          for archive in *.tar.gz; do
+            if [ -f "$archive" ]; then
+              echo "Contents of $archive:"
+              tar -tzf "$archive" | head -20
+              echo ""
+            fi
+          done
+          for archive in *.zip; do
+            if [ -f "$archive" ]; then
+              echo "Contents of $archive:"
+              unzip -l "$archive" | head -20
+              echo ""
+            fi
+          done
+
   # ============================================================================
   # UPGRADE-VERIFY - Verify upgrade command works on all platforms
   # This catches asset naming mismatches between upgrade.go and GoReleaser
   # ============================================================================
   upgrade-verify:
     name: Verify Upgrade (${{ matrix.os }})
     needs: release
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -174,7 +222,7 @@ jobs:
           - os: macos-latest
             goos: darwin
             goarch: arm64
-          - os: macos-15
+          - os: macos-13
             goos: darwin
             goarch: amd64
           - os: windows-latest
@@ -200,9 +248,9 @@ jobs:
           echo "Testing upgrade --check on ${{ matrix.goos }}/${{ matrix.goarch }}"
           # Run upgrade --check and capture output
           if ./ntm upgrade --check 2>&1 | tee upgrade_output.txt; then
-            echo "✓ Upgrade check passed"
+            echo "Upgrade check passed"
           else
-            echo "✗ Upgrade check failed"
+            echo "Upgrade check failed"
             cat upgrade_output.txt
             exit 1
           fi
@@ -214,14 +262,15 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
 
-          echo "✓ Asset naming contract verified for ${{ matrix.goos }}/${{ matrix.goarch }}"
+          echo "Asset naming contract verified for ${{ matrix.goos }}/${{ matrix.goarch }}"
 
   # ============================================================================
   # ANNOUNCE - Post-release notifications
   # ============================================================================
   announce:
     name: Announce Release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     needs: [release, verify, upgrade-verify]
     steps:
       - name: Get release info
@@ -246,3 +295,10 @@ jobs:
           echo "# Go install" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "go install github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/cmd/ntm@${{ steps.release.outputs.tag }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## Verification" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "All release artifacts have been verified:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- SHA256 checksums validated" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- Upgrade command tested on Linux, macOS, and Windows" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "- Docker images built with SBOM and provenance" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
